summary: Iteration 258 - Site-Wide Progressive Learning & Synthesis Engine Testing Complete. Backend: 15/15 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All UI components verified. New features: 3-Position Interaction Intensity Switch (Focus/Guided/Immersive), Segmented Academy zones (Foundation/Forge/Collective), Progressive Auto-Scale logic, Immersive mode golden overlay, Teachable moments context-aware micro-lessons.
critical_code_review_comments: academy.py: INTENSITY_LEVELS dict defines 3 levels (focus/guided/immersive) with teachable_moments, ghost_skeleton, forge_takeover flags
academy.py: PROGRAM_ZONES dict defines 3 zones (foundation/forge/collective) with colors and icons
academy.py: TEACHABLE_MOMENTS list has 6 context-aware micro-lessons with intensity_min requirements
academy.py: get_interaction_intensity() returns current level, auto_advance status, and all 3 levels
academy.py: set_interaction_intensity() validates level and persists to learning_profiles collection
academy.py: get_teachable_moments() filters by intensity level, context, completed modules, and dismissed moments
academy.py: check_auto_scale() checks resonance/modules thresholds for auto-advance (focusâ†’guided: 200RP+2mod, guidedâ†’immersive: 1000RP+8mod)
academy.py: get_programs() now includes zone, zone_data, intensity, and zones array in response
AcademyPage.js: IntensitySwitch component renders 3-position slider with Focus/Guided/Immersive buttons
AcademyPage.js: ImmersiveOverlay component renders golden radial gradient when intensity='immersive'
AcademyPage.js: AutoScalePrompt component shows upgrade prompt with accept/dismiss buttons
AcademyPage.js: Zone tabs filter programs by zone (foundation/forge/collective)
ModalityContext.js: switchIntensity() calls PATCH /api/academy/intensity and updates state
ModalityContext.js: Auto-scale check runs every 60 seconds when autoAdvance is enabled
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 258 verified Progressive Learning & Synthesis Engine: (1) GET /api/academy/intensity returns current intensity level (focus/guided/immersive), auto_advance status, and all 3 levels with properties (teachable_moments, ghost_skeleton, forge_takeover, color). (2) PATCH /api/academy/intensity switches intensity and optionally sets auto_advance preference. (3) GET /api/academy/teachable-moments returns filtered moments based on intensity level and context - returns empty array when intensity='focus'. (4) POST /api/academy/dismiss-moment dismisses a teachable moment. (5) GET /api/academy/auto-scale checks resonance/modules thresholds for auto-advance (focusâ†’guided: 200RP+2mod, guidedâ†’immersive: 1000RP+8mod). (6) GET /api/academy/programs now includes zone, zone_data, intensity, and zones array. (7) Frontend: IntensitySwitch renders 3-position slider with data-testid='intensity-switch', 'intensity-focus', 'intensity-guided', 'intensity-immersive'. (8) Frontend: Zone tabs render with data-testid='zone-tabs', 'zone-all', 'zone-foundation', 'zone-forge', 'zone-collective'. (9) Frontend: ImmersiveOverlay (data-testid='immersive-overlay') shows golden gradient when intensity='immersive'. (10) Frontend: AutoScalePrompt (data-testid='auto-scale-prompt') shows upgrade prompt with accept/dismiss buttons. (11) Frontend: Modality toggle still works correctly after intensity changes. (12) Frontend: Lesson viewer opens and completes correctly. (13) Frontend: Forge Lab modal opens with matrix visualization. (14) Test user grad_test_522@test.com has 323 RP, 4/16 modules completed, Initiate tier.

backend_get_intensity.details: GET /api/academy/intensity returns current intensity level, auto_advance status, and all 3 levels

backend_patch_intensity.details: PATCH /api/academy/intensity switches intensity and returns updated data

backend_patch_intensity_auto_advance.details: PATCH /api/academy/intensity with auto_advance field sets auto-advance preference

backend_teachable_moments_guided.details: GET /api/academy/teachable-moments returns filtered moments based on intensity level

backend_teachable_moments_focus_empty.details: GET /api/academy/teachable-moments returns empty when intensity is 'focus'

backend_auto_scale_immersive.details: GET /api/academy/auto-scale returns should_advance=false when already at immersive

backend_programs_zone_data.details: GET /api/academy/programs includes zone and zone_data for each program

backend_programs_zones_array.details: GET /api/academy/programs returns zones array with foundation/forge/collective

frontend_intensity_switch.details: Interaction Intensity Switch renders with 3 options (Focus/Guided/Immersive)

frontend_intensity_click.details: Clicking intensity buttons switches the active intensity

frontend_zone_tabs.details: Zone tabs (All/Foundation/Forge/Collective) render and filter programs

frontend_zone_filter.details: Clicking a zone tab filters programs to that zone only

frontend_modality_toggle.details: Modality toggle still works correctly after intensity changes

frontend_lesson_viewer.details: Lesson viewer opens and completes correctly

frontend_forge_lab.details: Forge Lab modal opens with matrix visualization

frontend_academy_header.details: Academy header shows current modality and intensity mode
